sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Key answers about using Spellvault as an MTG price tracker.

items.title: What is an MTG price tracker?
items.description: An MTG price tracker helps you follow price movement over time instead of checking cards one by one in isolation.

items.title: Does Spellvault track total collection value?
items.description: Yes. You can follow both individual cards and the combined value of the collection.

items.title: Can I use alerts for price movement?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is designed to make important price changes easier to notice and act on.

items.title: Why is tracking better than checking once?
items.description: Because trends and movement over time give you much better context than a single price snapshot.
